decisions.reasoning: Iron Hands threatens a 2HKO with Drain Punch and out-damages Incineroar significantly. Switching to Flutter Mane provides an immunity to the Fighting-type STAB and forces the opponent to respect the threat of a super-effective Fairy attack.
I outspeed Iron Hands and Moonblast is a guaranteed OHKO, fulfilling the primary decision priority.

Flutter Mane is threatened with an OHKO by Flare Blitz and cannot secure a KO this turn. Switching to Incineroar provides a safe defensive pivot to resist Fire-type attacks and utilize Intimidate to mitigate physical pressure.

Since both Incineroars are resisting each other and neither can secure a quick KO, Parting Shot is the optimal play to lower the opponent's stats and gain momentum by bringing in a more threatening sweeper.
Since we are in a speed tie and neither Incineroar can OHKO the other, Knock Off is the safest play to remove the opponent's item and gain information while maintaining momentum.

High Horsepower is a 2HKO on Incineroar and forces them to either switch or risk being KO'd. Since I am at full health and Incineroar cannot OHKO me, attacking is the optimal play to maintain momentum.

High Horsepower is a guaranteed 2HKO and has a high chance to KO the Incineroar given its current HP status, which is significantly lower than the 10% threshold mentioned in the summary. Even if the opponent stays in to Flare Blitz, securing the KO now removes the Intimidate threat and prevents further momentum.
Glacial Lance is a guaranteed OHKO on Tornadus-Therian. Since I can secure the KO this turn, I must attack regardless of the speed disadvantage.
